utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides physical_health and mental_health with plan names and monthly costs. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides home_contents with plan name and monthly cost. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides base_plan and add_ons with costs. This satisfies travel insurance with costs. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists three services each with monthly cost. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly_cost and annual_cost. Fully specified.
All 5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific items that can be matched against the ground-truth ratings. Map each named plan/add-on/service exactly to its corresponding entry in the ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) = 9 under primary_health_coverage.physical_health; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) = 9 under primary_health_coverage.mental_health; LifeFirst Standard Coverage (home contents) = 9 under property_protection.home_content; InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel base) = 10 under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance; Adventure Travel Coverage = 10 under travel_enhancement_services; Premium Medical Network = 7 under travel_enhancement_services; Telemedicine Services = 8 under health_enhancement_services; Gym Membership Reimbursement = 4 under health_enhancement_services; Wellness Programs = 3 under health_enhancement_services.
